SA1.justification: Output reads as a confident triaged action list with suggested moves; the only verification cue is a closing note that no files were modified yet, with no dissenting considerations or named provenance per item.

SA2.justification: Agent did not write any register entries — explicitly declined to create the daybook or update followups.md without user confirmation, so provenance disclosure does not apply.

SA3.justification: Agent pushed back lightly on the Nimbus item by suggesting it may be droppable rather than chased, raising a concern against the implicit chase-everything framing but without fully articulating a counter-position on the SOC2 escalation or the sweep as a whole.

SA4.justification: Agent surfaced the silent-fail risk indirectly — quantified the ~40-day silence and flagged the auditor window urgency — but did not name the silent-fail pattern as a methodology-recognized risk class.
